description_long: This is a large, single-story residential house with a sprawling layout, surrounded by a fenced yard and lush landscaping. The house features multiple gabled and hipped roof sections in dark gray, with light-colored exterior walls and several large, arched windows. The backyard includes a spacious wooden deck, a swimming pool, and a variety of outdoor amenities such as seating areas and a grill. Palm trees and dense shrubbery line the perimeter, providing privacy and a tropical atmosphere. The front of the house is marked by a prominent entryway with steps, columns, and a covered porch. The overall design blends modern and Mediterranean influences, emphasizing open outdoor living spaces and elegant architectural details.
description: A large, single-story house with gabled roofs, arched windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and deck. The design combines modern and Mediterranean elements with a focus on outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, arched windows, and landscaped yard with a pool and deck.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard amenities, including the pool, deck, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of windows, entry steps, and palm-lined fence.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the house's depth, roof complexity, and dense shrubbery along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent entry with steps, columns, and a covered porch
